title: Ukrainian Frittata
description: A hearty and flavorful breakfast dish inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, featuring a rich egg frittata filled with savory ingredients.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the Ukrainian sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned and cooked through.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the chopped fresh dill and parsley, and shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked sausage in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the frittata is set and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh chives.
Let the frittata cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
